[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 111100101 6
3 011101011 6
4 000001111 4
5 010010011 4
6 001000100 2
7 111100100 5

23 32 000000011 2
34 43 000000000 a match 0 1

56 65 011100100 4
67 76 001000101 3
70 07 001000101 3

13 31 010000011 3
